basic_details.job_title: FM University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 53 Posts
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Shortlisting + Interview / Presentation as per UGC norms
basic_details.short_information: Fakir Mohan University, Balasore, Odisha has published the Advertisement for Recruitment of Faculty Positions (Professor, Associate Professor & Assistant Professor) including backlog vacancies on 02 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 53 regular faculty positions across 21 Post Graduate Departments. Applications are invited from eligible Indian Nationals as per UGC Regulations 2018 (and subsequent amendments) for various teaching posts. Interested candidates can apply online through the official portal from 7th May 2026 to 7th June 2026. The hard copy of the application along with all

qualification.details: Candidates must strictly fulfill the qualifications as per UGC Regulations 2018 (and amendments). | Professor: | Ph.D. degree + 10 research publications + Total Research Score of 120 + Minimum 10 years teaching/research experience (with evidence of guiding Ph.D. scholars). | Associate Professor: | Ph.D. degree + Master’s with 55% marks + 8 years teaching/research experience + 7 publications + Research Score of 75. | Assistant Professor: | Master’s degree with 55% marks + NET / SET / Ph.D. as per UGC norms. | Relaxation: 5% relaxation in marks for SC/ST/PwD candidates.

how_to_apply: Candidates must follow the two-step application process (Online + Hard Copy Submission) carefully. Incomplete applications or applications received after the due date will be summarily rejected.

Register and Fill Online Application Form Visit the official recruitment portal at https://himsrecruitment.odisha.gov.in and register using a valid email ID and mobile number. Fill all the required personal, educational, experience, and research details accurately in the online application form. Candidates must ensure that all information provided matches their original documents.

Upload Scanned Documents Upload clear scanned copies of all essential documents including: Matriculation/SSC certificate (proof of date of birth) Master’s Degree marksheets & certificate Ph.D. Degree & certificates NET/SET/SLET certificate (if applicable) Experience certificates Caste / SEBC / PwD certificate (if claiming reservation) Research publications, API / Research Score details (for Professor & Associate Professor) Recent passport-size photograph and signature. All documents must be in the prescribed format and size as mentioned on the portal.
Matriculation/SSC certificate (proof of date of birth)
important_instructions: Only online applications followed by hard copy submission will be accepted. Separate applications are required for each post if applying in multiple departments. In-service candidates must apply through proper channel or submit NOC. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The University reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Jurisdiction for any dispute shall be High Court of Odisha.
